report_name: Global Compliance Reshaped as NIS2, SEC Disclosure Rules, and AI Laws Come into Force

identities.name: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission
identities.description: A U.S. government agency that has implemented new rules requiring public companies to disclose material cyber incidents within four days and provide annual disclosures on cybersecurity risk management.

identities.name: European Union
identities.description: A political and economic union that has brought into force the NIS2 Directive and the Cyber Resilience Act, imposing stricter cybersecurity requirements on a wide range of organizations.
